name: exa
description: Neural web search, page contents, similar-link discovery, and grounded answers via the Exa API

envVars.name: EXA_API_KEY
envVars.description: Exa API key from the Exa dashboard

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search the web with Exa's neural and keyword search

type.description: Search type: auto, fast, instant, deep, or keyword

category.description: Focus category, e.g. company, research paper, news, github, pdf

contents.description: Content options, e.g. {"text":true} to include page text in results

historicalSummary.omitted: page text, highlights, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Contents
tools.description: Get parsed page contents, summaries, and metadata for a list of URLs

urls.description: URLs to fetch contents for, e.g. ["https://example.com"]

summary.description: Summary options, e.g. {"query":"What is this page about?"}

highlights.description: Highlight options for key excerpts, e.g. {"numSentences":3}

tools.name: Find Similar Links
tools.description: Find pages similar in meaning to a given URL

url.description: URL to find similar pages for

contents.description: Content options, e.g. {"text":true} to include page text in results

tools.name: Answer
tools.description: Get an LLM-generated answer to a question grounded in Exa search results with citations

text.description: Include full text of citation sources

prompts.title: Search the web
prompts.prompt: Use Exa to search the web for a topic I provide and summarize the top results.

prompts.title: Find similar pages
prompts.prompt: Find pages similar to a URL I provide using Exa and explain how they relate.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Exa API Setup

steps.title: Create an Exa account
steps.description: Go to https://dashboard.exa.ai and sign up — new accounts include free credits for testing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys and create a key with a descriptive name (e.g. 'Veryfront Integration').

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as EXA_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Search tool with a simple query. A 401 means the key is invalid; a 402 means you are out of credits.

notes: All endpoints are billed per request from your credit balance; Answer also incurs LLM generation cost
Deep search types cost more than fast/instant — use type 'auto' unless you need depth
